description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a broad, dark gabled roof and a rectangular footprint. The structure is surrounded by a well-maintained lawn, bordered by a paved driveway and a road, with a water feature visible at the rear. The front facade features a covered entryway and a small porch, while the windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern across the visible sides. The exterior walls appear to be finished in a light-colored material, likely stucco or painted concrete, with darker trim around the windows and doors. The roof overhangs slightly, providing shade and architectural interest, and the property is set within a suburban-style plot with clear boundaries. The overall design is modern yet simple, emphasizing functionality and comfort.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a dark gabled roof, light exterior walls, and a symmetrical window arrangement, set on a landscaped suburban plot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, and driveway leading to the road.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway wrapping around the building and the proximity to the road.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard area and the water feature at the edge of the property.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with clear visibility of the driveway, side windows, and lawn.
